data.title: Replace Step 3 with read_first gate and Step 4 with test validation in task-execution.md
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Step 3 contains mandatory instruction to read every file in the ticket file impact section before edits
  Verify: grep -q "file impact\|file.*list\|read.*every.*file\|mandatory.*read" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Step 3 contains suffix-matched exemplar discovery for create-action files (same directory first, then project-wide)
  Verify: grep -q "exemplar\|suffix.*match\|sibling" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Suffix matching covers PascalCase (*Controller.java), snake_case (*_controller.py), and kebab-case (*-controller.ts)
  Verify: grep -q "PascalCase\|snake_case\|kebab" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Agents skip supplemental reads when no suffix pattern is extractable (flat lowercase, generic names)
  Verify: grep -q "skip\|no.*pattern\|generic" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Step 4 instructs agents to read and validate existing RED tests (not write new tests)
  Verify: grep -q "existing.*test\|validat.*test\|RED.*test\|already written" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Step 4 instructs agents to flag missing tests rather than writing them
  Verify: grep -q "flag\|missing\|report" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] CHECKPOINT 2/6 records which files and exemplars were read
  Verify: grep -A2 "CHECKPOINT 2/6" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md | grep -q "files\|exemplar\|read"
- [ ] Checkpoint sequence remains 6 stages (no renumbering)
  Verify: grep -c "CHECKPOINT [1-6]/6" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Vague "Read relevant existing code" instruction is removed
  Verify: { grep -q "Read relevant existing code" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] "Write unit tests" instruction is removed
  Verify: { grep -q "Write unit tests" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md; test $? -ne 0; }

## TDD Requirement
The RED tests from task 476f-4dbc must pass (GREEN) after this task's changes.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md (modify)
